_meta.purpose: Comprehensive portfolio profile — who is HoaTV (MAD)?

identity.title: Senior Game Developer
identity.headline: 7+ years building high-quality 2D/3D games, GameFi/Web3 titles, and AI-powered tools

about.summary: A highly experienced Senior Unity Developer with 7+ years in the game industry, specializing in building high-quality 2D/3D games for mobile and web platforms. Expertise spans idle, defense, strategy, and GameFi games with deep integration of blockchain technologies (NFT, Web3) and monetization systems.
about.pitch: I take pride in delivering cross-platform Unity experiences with custom game mechanics, clean UI/UX, optimized performance, and scalable design systems — all crafted with precision and creativity. I've led and solo-developed projects from concept to release, and continuously improve through prototyping, reskinning, and long-term support.
whyMe: Passionate & Reliable — From concept to release
Fast & Professional — Delivery with high quality
Creative Problem Solver — Focused on gameplay and performance
Long-Term Support — Helping you scale your product

careerHighlights: 50+ published games on App Store, Google Play, and WebGL
Full-cycle developer: concept → gameplay core → UI/UX → performance optimization → publishing & live ops
Blockchain/GameFi Integration: hands-on experience with NFT marketplace, staking, wallets (MetaMask, TON, World App), and Play-to-Earn economy
Team Leadership: managed and mentored 5–15 devs/artists/designers, applying Agile/Scrum and CI/CD pipelines
Cross-platform: Unity WebGL, iOS, Android, Telegram Mini App, World App, with self-deployed backend (Docker, Firebase, AWS, Supabase)

services.title: Unity Game Development
services.description: Build high-quality 2D/3D mobile games, from core mechanics to monetization and publishing.

services.title: Application Development
services.description: Create mobile and desktop apps tailored to business needs and user experiences.

services.description: Integrate NFTs, wallets, and GameFi features seamlessly into Unity games.

services.title: n8n Automation & AI Workflows
services.description: Automate workflows, AI agents, and cross-platform integrations with n8n.

services.title: Telegram Game & Bot
services.description: Build interactive Telegram games, AI bots, and mini-apps for global audiences.

services.title: Ads & Monetization
services.description: Boost revenue with ad networks, in-app purchases, plugin systems, and reskin workflows.

services: Google Ads, SDK Integration, and Analytics

experience.description: Working as an independent freelancer and remote team lead, focusing on building scalable game development pipelines, mentoring remote developers, and delivering Unity projects for global clients.
highlights: Leading and mentoring distributed teams (5–10 members) across multiple time zones
Delivering Unity projects for clients worldwide (casual, mid-core, GameFi, and Web3 games)
Remote-first approach: Agile management, CI/CD automation, and transparent collaboration
Combining technical expertise and leadership to scale both indie and outsourced game projects

experience.description: Developed and maintained casual games such as Sandwich, DOP, DIY, and Puzzle games.
highlights: Developed and maintained casual games (Sandwich, DOP, DIY, Puzzle)

experience.description: Developed and maintained a turn-based GameFi project (Nekoverse). Led team and managed tasks.
highlights: Developed and maintained a turn-based GameFi project
Managed and assigned tasks, supporting team members

experience.description: Developed and maintained an RTS strategy game combined with GameFi (Idle Cyber NFT).
highlights: Developed and maintained an RTS strategy game combined with GameFi

projects.title: Heroic Defense
projects.description: A mobile tower defense game with diverse enemies, special weapon mechanics, and gacha systems.
myContributions: Implemented unique enemy behaviors and new enemy types across multiple maps
Designed and optimized special weapon mechanics (saw, rocket, machine gun, flamethrower)
Developed robust reward systems with material drops and currency management
Created passive and active skill systems for dynamic gameplay
Enhanced combat with refined damage calculation and energy regeneration
Integrated SDK, ads, and in-app purchases (IAP)
Took full responsibility for core game development
achievements: 10K – 50K downloads on launch
200K+ total downloads after one month of release
Agile/Scrum methodology followed throughout

projects.title: Dalgona - Worldchain
projects.description: A fun and addictive mini-game integrated on World App. Inspired by the famous 'sugar candy challenge' (Dalgona), bringing a nostalgic yet thrilling experience to a global audience.
myContributions: Solo-developed the entire mini-game including core mechanics, difficulty progression, and win/lose logic
Designed and implemented UI/UX with playful animations
Optimized performance for Web3 Mini App integration within World App
Integrated leaderboard and ranking system
Published and maintained the game with continuous updates
achievements: 🏆 Reached Top 1 on the World App game ranking during launch period
Engaged hundreds of thousands of users within the Worldcoin ecosystem

projects.title: MU: Loren Mobile
projects.description: Mobile MMORPG inspired by the legendary MU Online, bringing classic character classes and intense PvE/PvP content with stunning 3D graphics optimized for mobile.
myContributions: Worked as Senior Unity Developer in a collaborative team
Developed and maintained quest system, class mechanics, and monster spawning logic
Handled performance profiling and optimization for smooth mobile gameplay
Integrated UI/UX elements and implemented in-game events and battle systems
keyFeatures: 5 iconic character classes: Dark Wizard, Dark Knight, Fairy Elf, Magic Gladiator, Dark Lord
Extensive quest system: daily, weekly, party, guild missions
Classic MU features: stat allocation, Loren Market free trade, Chaos System gear crafting
Signature events: Blood Castle, Devil Square, Chaos Castle, Arena

projects.title: ProxyAPI.MAD
projects.description: Part of the mad-agentic ecosystem. An AI proxy infrastructure that enables flexible API proxy solutions, supporting advanced AI automation systems and multi-provider integration.
keyFeatures: 🤖 Agentic AI Integration: Intelligent automation flows and pipelines via AI Agents
⚡ Seamless Proxying: Granular control over incoming/outgoing AI API requests and responses
🛠️ Flexible Architecture: Easily extendable and ready for new Agents
Dashboard, API Keys management, Providers panel, Chat Interface, Logs, Settings

projects.title: Nekoverse (NFT) — GameFi
projects.description: Play-to-Earn MMORPG built on blockchain technology, offering players a decentralized in-game economy and a Guild system utilizing DAO governance. Players engage in PvE/PvP battles, explore the world, farm resources, and craft items.
keyFeatures: Real-time Skill-based Battles: 1v1, 3v3, Tournaments, Boss Raids with elements/skills/equipment
Exploration & Resource Farming: discover hidden areas, harvest ores and wood, sell in marketplace
Comprehensive Crafting System: craft items that drive game progression
Neko Temple: stake in-game currencies to earn governance tokens and passive income
myContributions: Implemented core gameplay mechanics and optimized performance
Developed real-time battle systems including skill mechanics and elemental interactions
Integrated blockchain features (NFT assets, staking mechanisms) into Unity
Conducted performance profiling and optimization for various devices

projects.title: Idle Cyber (NFT)
projects.description: Cyberpunk idle tower defense game set in a post-apocalyptic 2077 world. Players defend Earth from alien invaders by strategically deploying legendary heroes, upgrading powerful weapons, and customizing gear to survive endless enemy waves and boss battles.
myContributions: Solo-developed full gameplay loop: stages, upgrades, rewards, ad integration
Implemented idle mechanics with strategic tower defense combat
Built a basic NFT marketplace with wallet and testnet blockchain integration
Handled UI/UX, animation integration, and performance optimization for mobile

projects.title: Sandwich Please!
projects.description: Delightful idle simulation game where players manage a bustling sandwich shop. Starting with basic ingredients, players expand their menu, upgrade their shop, and serve a growing number of customers.
keyFeatures: Idle Gameplay: Earn income even when offline
Menu Expansion: Unlock diverse sandwich ingredients
Shop Upgrades: Enhance shop equipment and decor
Customer Management: Serve customers with unique preferences
myContributions: Developed core gameplay mechanics including sandwich assembly and customer service systems
Implemented user interface elements and ensured smooth UX
Optimized game performance across various devices
Integrated analytics tools to monitor player engagement

projects.title: Crypto Quest
projects.description: Turn-based RPG inspired by Dragon Quest, incorporating quests, abilities, characters, and networking features. Built with a team of 14 (9 frontend, 3 backend, 2 testers) using Agile Scrum.
myContributions: Quest System: dynamic quest creation, completion, integration with backend quest logic
Audio System: Audio Manager for music, SFX, ambient sounds
Beast System: Beast Management module, API integration, UI for beast management
Game Mechanics: item usage, equipment management, skill integration, consumables, equipment rarity
UI/UX Enhancement: currency display, language settings, dialogue boxes, inventory, localization
Additional: Cheat Management, Cutscene Management, Tool Editor (Delete account, ScriptableObject Browser)
Live ops: content updates, bug fixes, performance optimizations

projects.title: Survivor.IO (Template)
projects.description: A Survivor.IO-inspired template project showcasing roguelite gameplay mechanics, character progression, and enemy spawning systems for mobile.

projects.title: Metame Amusement Park
projects.description: A metaverse-style amusement park experience built with Unreal Engine.

projects.title: Archero (Clone)
projects.description: A feature-complete clone of Archero built in Unity as a learning/prototype project.

personalityProfile.workStyle: Full-cycle developer who thrives from concept to shipping. Combines deep technical skill with product-minded leadership.
strengths: Solo-capable: can plan, design, build, and ship a complete product alone
Team multiplier: skilled at mentoring and orchestrating distributed teams
Cross-domain thinker: bridges game dev, blockchain, AI automation, and DevOps
Performance-obsessed: always optimizes for mobile and cross-platform stability
Entrepreneurial mindset: builds own tools (ProxyAPI.MAD, Agentic ecosystem)
passions: Building games that people love to play
Exploring AI and autonomous agent architectures

Integrated ADNX tracking SDKs and specific Vietnamese payment gateways
